theme: Light mode by default, toggleable Dark mode
archetype: Hybrid: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft surfaces) + Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast structure)
design_philosophy: A modern, Facebook-inspired educational social network. Focuses on clarity, generous spacing, and a welcoming 'love-at-first-sight' aesthetic. Uses primary blue for high contrast against pristine white (light mode) and deep dark (dark mode) backgrounds. Rejects generic corporate aesthetics in favor of crisp, organic interactions.

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous padding. Cards should feel breathable.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: 10-column layout on large screens. Left Sidebar: 2 cols, Feed: 5 cols, Right Sidebar: 3 cols. Add a max-width container (max-w-7xl) to keep it contained on ultra-wide monitors.

components.buttons: Rounded-full or rounded-xl, prominent primary button with #1877F2, soft hover transitions, no harsh shadows. Use crisp 1px borders for secondary buttons.
components.cards: Subtle roundness (rounded-2xl). Light mode: flat with 1px border. Dark mode: #1C1C1C background, 1px #2D2D2D border.
components.navbar: Sticky at top (z-50). Glassmorphism in Light mode (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl), Solid or subtle glass in Dark mode (bg-[#0F0F0F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl). Bottom border 1px.
components.sidebars: Fixed positioning. Left: Navigation icons and groups. Right: Trending and suggestions.
components.post_composer: Input area should have generous padding, rounded-2xl, subtle focus ring (ring-2 ring-[#1877F2] ring-offset-2).
components.avatars: Perfect circles. Add a 2px offset ring on hover (using #1877F2).

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Micro-lift (-translate-y-0.5) on cards, background darkening on buttons.
motion_and_interaction.focus: High contrast ring on all interactive elements for accessibility.

testing.data_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='post-like-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React app with Vite and Tailwind v4.
Install and configure lucide-react for all iconography.
Configure Tailwind for dark mode using the 'class' strategy.
Implement a ThemeProvider using Zustand. Persist the theme state in localStorage. Default to light mode.
Implement Axios instance setup in src/services (even though no backend, mock API calls to show realistic loading states).
Configure Shadcn UI primitives. Customize the global CSS to use the specific colors defined in the colors block.
Inject fonts (Outfit for Headings, Manrope for Body text) in index.css.
Construct the core Layout: Top Navbar (sticky, with search, theme toggle, and profile), Left Sidebar (fixed, navigation), Middle Feed, Right Sidebar (fixed, suggestions). Total max width bounded.
Implement Login/Register screen first. Keep it sleek, using one of the feed_posts images as a subtle background or split-screen visual.
Build the Home Feed. Include Stories/Highlights row at the top, a post composer card, and feed item cards.
Build User Profile and Study Groups pages using React Router v6.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to EVERY interactive element and critical UI text for automated testing.
